title: Circular (SARACHOR) #63 on the Adoption of the Market Economy_941014
title_en: Circular (SARACHOR) #63 on the Adoption of the Market Economy_941014
short_name: Circular (SARACHOR) #63 on the Adoption of the Market Eco...

provisions.content: All the prices of goods shall be determined by mutual agreement between buyers and sellers.

The State shall allow free competition between traders. In order to foster competition, the State shall

encourage the participation of all traders.

The state shall guarantee to the traders freedom to move goods.

In order to protect the interests of the citizen, the following measures shall be taken:

a) The sellers shall display the price of goods to the buyers.

b) The state shall regulate and monitor the quality of goods and assure the reliability of

measurements.

c) The state shall directly intervene in the market mechanism in the event of irregularity.

This circular shall enter into force from the date of its signature.



 Minister of Commerce

 Signature and Seal

 VAR HUOT
